subject: Cloud Computing
title: AI-Powered Cloud Operations
description: A quick, practical guide to AI-Powered Cloud Operations.

hook.text: What if the cloud could manage itself? AIOps uses machine learning to detect anomalies, predict failures, and auto-heal.

buildup.text: Modern cloud environments generate millions of metrics and logs. Humans can't monitor it all. AI filters the noise.

discovery.text: AI detects patterns humans miss: subtle performance drops, unusual traffic, and correlated failures across services.

twist.text: Auto-remediation is the next step: AI detects a problem and fixes it before any human knows there was an issue.

climax.text: AIOps is evolving toward autonomous cloud management. The goal: self-healing infrastructure that rarely needs humans.

punchline.text: AI manages the cloud so humans don't have to. Self-healing infrastructure.

quiz.question: What is the primary goal of AIOps?
options: Using AI to detect anomalies, predict failures, and automatically remediate issues
Replacing all cloud engineers with AI bots
Making cloud computing free by eliminating human labor costs
